'''napowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyklos|kyklos]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyklos|kyklos]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| napowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næpeweth|næpeweth]] || [[word:næpewej|næpewej]] || [[word:næpewesh|næpewesh]] || [[word:næpewe|næpewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:napopowoth|napopowoth]] || [[word:napopowoj|napopowoj]] || [[word:napopowosh|napopowosh]] || [[word:napopowo|napopowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:napowoth|napowoth]] || [[word:napowoj|napowoj]] || [[word:napowosh|napowosh]] || [[word:napowo|napowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:napofwoth|napofwoth]] || [[word:napofwoj|napofwoj]] || [[word:napofwosh|napofwosh]] || [[word:napofwof|napofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:napowotho|napowotho]] || [[word:napowojo|napowojo]] || [[word:napowosho|napowosho]] || [[word:napowoko|napowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:napowoth|napowoth]] || [[word:napowoj|napowoj]] || [[word:napowosh|napowosh]] || [[word:napowo|napowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:napowothol|napowothol]] || [[word:napowojol|napowojol]] || [[word:napowoshol|napowoshol]] || [[word:napowokol|napowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:napowothotho|napowothotho]] || [[word:napowojojo|napowojojo]] || [[word:napowoshosho|napowoshosho]] || [[word:napowoko|napowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:napowothon|napowothon]] || [[word:napowojon|napowojon]] || [[word:napowoshon|napowoshon]] || [[word:napowokon|napowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:napowothoro|napowothoro]] || [[word:napowojoro|napowojoro]] || [[word:napowoshoro|napowoshoro]] || [[word:napowokoro|napowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
